name: Lakshay Bhalla
tagline: Persistence is the key to success.
summary: 4x Oracle certified implementation specialist and Certified Unqork Developer with extensive experience in CX & CRM. Currently driving engineering excellence at Guardian Life, with a strong history at Walmart Global Tech and Virtuos Digital.

experience.desc: Leading IT engineering initiatives and digital transformation projects.
Software Engineer II from Oct 2021 - Nov 2023. Delivered high-scale solutions for global retail operations.

Led 3 Oracle Service Cloud projects successfully. Progressed from Associate Application Developer. Specialized in building custom processes in RightNow Connect PHP frameworks, CTI Integration, and Workflow design.
Focused on Customer Portal Development, REST/SOAP API integration, and BUI Extension development.
Developed a Keylogger Application in C# with accurate keystroke registration and file structuring.

education.school: World College of Technology and Management
education.degree: Bachelor of Technology - BTech, Computer Science

certifications: Oracle Cloud Customer Connect - Silver Trophy
Oracle RightNow Cloud Service 2016 Technical Certified
